# ContCave - Studio Booking Platform for Creators

## About
ContCave is India's trusted marketplace for photography, film, and event-ready studios. We help creators discover, compare, and book verified production spaces across major Indian cities.

## Core Services
- Studio rental booking (hourly basis)
- Photography and video shoot spaces
- Podcast studio rentals
- Event space bookings
- Cyclorama and green screen studios
- Recording studios
- Café and restaurant spaces for shoots

## Key Features
- Verified studio listings across India
- Real-time availability and booking
- Secure payment processing
- Calendar integration
- Review and rating system
- Location-based search
- Category filtering (Indoor, Outdoor, Podcast, etc.)

## Target Cities
Mumbai, Delhi, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Pune, Noida, Gurugram, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Lucknow, Chandigarh, Indore, Goa, and more.

## Business Model
- Platform connects space owners with creators
- Hourly rental bookings
- Commission-based revenue model
- Payment processing via Cashfree

## Technology Stack
- Next.js 16 (React framework)
- TypeScript
- Prisma (Database ORM)
- NextAuth (Authentication)
- Vercel (Hosting)

## Contact
- Email: info@contcave.com
- Website: https://contcave.com
- Social: @ContCave on Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn

## Content Guidelines
- All listings are verified before publication
- Studios must meet quality standards
- Transparent pricing and availability
- User reviews and ratings

## API Endpoints
- /api/listings - Browse available studios
- /api/auth - Authentication
- /api/bookings - Booking management
- /api/payments - Payment processing

## Legal
- Privacy Policy: /privacy-policy
- Terms & Conditions: /terms-and-conditions
- Cancellation Policy: /cancellation
